infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aura Health needs camera access for biometric enrollment and document scanning.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Aura Health uses Face ID for secure, passwordless login.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Aura Health connects to medical wearables and health monitoring devices via Bluetooth.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Aura Health communicates with Bluetooth-enabled medical devices to sync your health data.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Aura Health reads your health data to provide personalized health insights and triage recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Aura Health writes health data from connected medical devices to your Health app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aura Health uses the microphone for voice-based symptom description during triage.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aura Health uses your location to find nearby healthcare facilities and for regional health insights.
